title: joniris uniflora var. caricina
intro: Joniris uniflora var. caricina, also known as Iris pseudacorus or Yellow Flag, is a perennial plant belonging to the Iridaceae family. Its medicinal properties include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can be used to treat various health issues such as skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of Joniris uniflora var. caricina include reducing inflammation, treating eczema, and promoting skin healing. The plant is often used in herbal preparations, such as infusions and tinctures, to harness its medicinal properties.
